violations.description: Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored, handled, dispensed in a manner to protect from contamination. To-go items and pizza boxes on the floor of the storage trailer behind the store.

Plumbing system. — --Plumbing system was not designed, constructed, operated and/or maintained according to regulation. Piping connected to the dish sprayer at the 3 compartment sink was leaking/spraying water at the time of inspection.

Handwashing lavatory supplies. — --Handwash lavatory was not supplied with supply of individual disposable towels, continuous towel supply system, or heated air-drying device. Towels were out at the hand sink by the 3 compartment sink.
